title.en: Research on the Evolution of Java Database Connection Pools and HikariCP Performance Mechanisms
title.zh: Java 数据库连接池的发展历程与 HikariCP 性能机制研究

summary.en: A systematic study of Java database connection-pool evolution from DBCP and C3P0 to Tomcat JDBC Pool, BoneCP, Druid, and HikariCP, covering DataSource, connection reuse, lock contention, observability, SQL governance, ConcurrentBag, FastList, JIT-friendly proxies, lifecycle management, and selection guidance.
summary.zh: 系统研究 Java 数据库连接池从 DBCP、C3P0 到 Tomcat JDBC Pool、BoneCP、Druid、HikariCP 的演进，覆盖 DataSource、连接复用、锁竞争、可观测性、SQL 治理、ConcurrentBag、FastList、JIT 友好代理、生命周期管理与选型建议。

readingDirection.en: Read this when choosing a Java JDBC connection pool, comparing HikariCP, Druid, Tomcat JDBC Pool, DBCP, C3P0, and BoneCP, tuning Spring Boot database access, or understanding connection-pool performance mechanisms and lifecycle configuration.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在选择 Java JDBC 连接池、比较 HikariCP、Druid、Tomcat JDBC Pool、DBCP、C3P0、BoneCP，调优 Spring Boot 数据库访问，或理解连接池性能机制与生命周期配置时阅读。
